Scenario:
Full happy-path procurement: get designations → check duplicates →
submit indent → HOD approves → PS admin views stock → audit log verified
Expected Final State:
All API steps return 2xx; indent progresses through states;
AuditLog entry created; stock available for next step

Scenario:
Interrupted workflow — employee cancels indent mid-process,
then system prevents further rejection of the cancelled indent
Expected Final State:
Cancel returns 200/204; subsequent reject returns 400/409;
indent.status remains CANCELLED; no further state transitions permitted

Scenario:
Check stock availability → view stock entries → perform transfer
of selected items → verify StockItem updated
Expected Final State:
Stock view returns 200; Stock entry view returns 200;
Transfer returns 200/201; StockItem.isTransferred = True

Scenario:
Attempt to transfer stock item that is already in use (inUse=True)
or already transferred — item should be filtered out
Expected Final State:
In-use stock item does not appear in available stock pool;
Double-transfer attempt returns 400/error; data integrity preserved

Scenario:
List GRNs → identify discrepant GRN → create ProductReturn →
process return with REFUND resolution → verify status updated
Expected Final State:
GRN list returns 200; Return created (200/201);
Resolution updates return.status; invoice_hold_released = True

Scenario:
Attempt to process a product return that does not exist —
system must return 404, not crash with 500
Expected Final State:
HTTP 404 returned for non-existent return ID;
No server crash; no data corruption; clean error message
